response.justification: Bogdan brings solid full-stack breadth and genuine distributed systems exposure (high-throughput microservices at Dunnhumby, multi-language backend work), but the resume contains no evidence of the domain expertise this role centers on: experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, rollout automation, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical/experimental analysis. The current title is Staff/Senior, not Principal, and there is no track record of cross-team platform ownership or growth engineering. The AI-agent and developer-tooling work at re:cinq is recent and thin on detail. Without any experimentation or measurement platform signal, the candidate does not meet even the baseline requirements for this IC6 role.
strengths: 15+ years of engineering experience across web, embedded, and distributed systems with demonstrated polyglot proficiency (TypeScript, C++, Java, DLang, C#)
High-throughput systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency, async I/O design
Strong software-craftsmanship orientation (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open-source platform authorship)
concerns: Zero evidence of experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management — the core domain of this role
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or data/statistical analysis experience visible anywhere in the resume
No Principal-level track record: no cross-team platform ownership, no architectural leadership across multiple workstreams, and title history peaks at Staff/Senior

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background
Distributed systems and high-throughput service experience
